title: The Tail of Two Mice: Surprise and Hoodie
summary: In a series of tiny adventures, Surprise Mouse lives in a fabric house within a larger human home. One morning, she finds a pile of leaves and decides to create a complex leaf picture. With help from her parents, she completes her masterpiece of a bus driving through the leaves. Elsewhere, Hoodie the Mouse enjoys a feast of tomato soup, crackers, meatballs, and spaghetti. After cleaning up his meal, he gathers twigs and feathers to build a cozy nest for a long, restful sleep.

highlightQuote.text: It was a picture of a bus driving the leaves.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: First one about Surprise Mouse playing.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, a story about Surprise Mouse playing. Once upon a time, Surprise Mouse was in his little house. Where was Surprise Mouse's little house?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It was made of fabric.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: It was made of fabric. Oh, and was it out in the forest or inside Mommy and Daddy's house?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Inside Mommy and Daddy's house.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, and Surprise Mouse woke up one day and was very excited to play. And so she came out of her fabric house and she saw a fun toy to play with. What was the fun toy?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: A leaf toy.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: It was what?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: A leaf toy.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: A leaf toy, and so she decided...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It was a pile.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: A pile? Oh, a pile of leaves. Surprise Mouse decided to play with the pile of leaves. And what did she do with it?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: She brought it home.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: She brought it home. And what did she do there with it at home?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: She made a leaf picture.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: A leaf picture. What was it a picture of?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It was a picture of a bus driving the leaves.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: A bus driving the leaves. Wow, that sounds like an amazing leaf picture. And then what did Surprise Mouse do?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: She tried to make it, but she asked her mom and dad to help her because it was kind of tricky. Now do the other one story.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, she asked her mom and dad to help her because it was kind of tricky, but then they made the leaf picture of the bus driver. The end. And now...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Another story.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And now another story. Okay, what's this one going to be about?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: A different kind of mouse.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: A different kind of mouse.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: His name was called Hoodie the Mouse. Hoodie the Mouse.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Hoodie the Mouse. Oh. Okay, here's our story about Hoodie the Mouse. Once upon a time, Hoodie the Mouse, um, was having some lunch. What was Hoodie having for lunch?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Um, he was having tomato soup.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And what else with the soup?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I don't know.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Some crackers.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And meatballs.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And meatballs. And what else?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Spaghetti.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And spaghetti. And Hoodie was eating this big delicious lunch. And then he was all finished and he cleaned up his lunch. And then what did he decide to do next?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Make a nest and play.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: He made a nest and he looked around for what to make his nest out of. And what did he find?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Something that he brought from outside.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, some leaves and twigs and feathers. And he made his beautiful nest. And then what did he do?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: He sleep in it. The end.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Wow, what a beautiful story about Hoodie the Mouse. Thanks Izzy.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Now, now, now it's time to turn off the star.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, let's turn off the stars.

characters.name: Surprise Mouse
characters.description: A creative mouse inhabiting a sturdy fabric fortress, where they transform the brittle gold of autumn leaves into intricate art while navigating a life punctuated by sudden, marvelous surprises.

characters.name: Hoodie the Mouse
characters.description: A different mouse with a large appetite for Italian cuisine and a talent for building cozy nests.

characters.name: Mom Mouse
characters.description: Surprise Mouse's mother who provides assistance with difficult leaf art.

characters.name: Dad Mouse
characters.description: A devoted patriarch who flourishes in the company of his kin, Surprise Mouse’s father is her most steadfast creative collaborator, lending a patient hand to her artistic projects while cherishing the simple warmth of shared family time.

places.name: Fabric House
places.description: Surprise Mouse's cozy, soft home located inside a larger residence.

places.name: Mommy
places.description: The human house that provides the environment for Surprise Mouse's smaller home.

places.name: Daddy's House
places.description: The human house that provides the environment for Surprise Mouse's smaller home.

places.name: Hoodie's Nest
places.description: A soft sleeping spot constructed from twigs, leaves, and feathers gathered from the outdoors.

places.name: Outside
places.description: The natural area where Hoodie collects materials for his construction and play.
